name: strata-memory
description: Turn a Strata Space into your coding agent's long-term memory. On every prompt the plugin hybrid-searches the bound Space and surfaces relevant documents with a standing contract: if your work changes a fact you relied on, update that document. A stop-time nudge catches forgotten write-backs. Skills: strata-memory-init (bind a Space), strata-memory-status (diagnose the memory loop). Requires the strata CLI (Homebrew).
